signals.headline: Secondary Development:** Ethereum surged over 50% in a single week during early April following the same ceasefire annou
signals.raw: Secondary Development:** Ethereum surged over 50% in a single week during early April following the same ceasefire announcement, significantly outperforming Bitcoin's 8% gain over the identical period[4]. ETH recovered to approximately $2,358 by April 17[3], though it remains down 27% year-to-date compared to Bitcoin's 19% decline[4].
